meta.title: Behind the Scenes Photoshop - Cone of Shame No More
meta.description:
My cat just got back from surgery and she arrived home with a cone of shame. I decided we should make her fit it more, so I figured we'd photoshop her cone to look more like an space suit helmet! A nice and easy photoshop but a fun one!

Make sure and see the final image on Instagram @EverydayAstronaut

Tune in live every Thursday at 1:00 p.m. central (19 UTC) at http://twitch.tv/everydayastronaut
